subject: Re: cropping on X side of image
body:
Thank you both,
I am on the latest nightly build 2020-11-04 and having this issue.  Not 
sure how to install the patch.
I ended up trying imod with newstack but that didn't work.   What worked 
was EMAN2 e2proc3d.py to reprocess all of the tilts.
thanks all!
Jesse

On Tuesday, June 13, 2023 at 10:28:48 PM UTC+2 Pranav Shah wrote:

> I believe a patch was released for this bug, so try applying that before 
> running newstack…
>
> On Tue, 13 Jun 2023 at 20:49, Alister Burt <alist...@gmail.com> wrote:
>
>> Hey Jesse,
>>
>> There is some mismatch between the data in the extended header and what 
>> warp is expecting there - a simple way to solve this would be to run each 
>> image through the imod program newstack
>>
>> Cheers,
>>
>> Alister
>>
>> Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
>>
>> On 13 Jun 2023, at 15:19, Jesse Hansen <bluu...@gmail.com> wrote:
>>
>> ﻿
>> hi all,
>>
>> has anyone seen such a weird artifact (far right side of image) when 
>> importing data from falcon 4.  I checked the raw data with 3dmod and do not 
>> see this effect, so it seems to be rather something up with WARP.    
>>
>> thanks
>>
>> Jesse
>> <Screenshot from 2023-06-13 16-15-44.png>
>>
